intent.goal: Refactor AuthMiddleware to use JWT validation instead of session cookies
intent.approach: Replacing session lookup in handle() with TokenValidator::verify(). Keeping backward compat by accepting both formats during migration window.

boundary.blocked_on: TokenValidator::verify needs access to the JWKS endpoint, but the HTTP client isn't available in the middleware layer. Need to either inject it or restructure the dependency.
next_steps: Decide whether to inject HttpClient into AuthMiddleware or create a JwksCache that pre-fetches keys at startup
Fix the 2 failing tests in tests/auth_test.rs (they expect session cookie format)
Update the OpenAPI spec to document the new Authorization: Bearer header
warnings: Don't remove the session cookie path yet — existing clients depend on it until v2 migration completes
The TokenValidator::verify function is called from 3 other modules (check find_references before changing its signature)

evidence.label: Session where auth refactor was started
